description: A SMALL, illustrative snapshot of real legal authorities used to demonstrate the legal_citation_exists verifier (the Mata v. Avianca killer). In production this list must be populated from an authoritative primary source — Hong Kong e-Legislation (elegislation.gov.hk, the sole official source of verified consolidated legislation since Q1 2025, Cap. 614) and HKLII (hklii.hk) for case law, supplemented by Westlaw Asia / LexisNexis HK. This file is a stand-in, NOT a citator. Every entry here is a real, publicly reported authority; do not treat the snapshot as exhaustive.

provenance.caseLaw: HKLII (hklii.hk), Free Access to Law Movement
provenance.legislation: Hong Kong e-Legislation (elegislation.gov.hk), Department of Justice
provenance.note: Entries below are drawn from publicly reported decisions and the statute book. Verified against an official reporter is the user's non-delegable duty — see docs/08-Domains/Legal-Industry-Fit.md.

authorities.name: Yu Hon Tong Thomas v Centaline Property Agency Ltd
authorities.note: Court criticised AI-drafted submissions for making up allegations without evidential basis.

authorities.name: Licksun Company Ltd v Occupiers of Lot No. 552 in D.D. 85
authorities.note: Court expressed serious concern over non-existent authorities cited by a litigant in person.

authorities.name: Ayinde v Haringey; Al-Haroun v Qatar National Bank
authorities.note: Heard under the Hamid jurisdiction; fabricated and misstated authorities.

authorities.name: Legislation Publication Ordinance
authorities.note: Gives verified e-Legislation copies legal status.

authorities.name: Personal Data (Privacy) Ordinance (PDPO)
authorities.note: Technology-neutral; six Data Protection Principles. Section 33 not yet in force.
